ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input event */,
  "input_library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the input library associated with the input */,
  "blob_input_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blob input associated with the input */,
  "index_in_blob" INTEGER /* Index of the input within the blob */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input event */,
  "input_description" TEXT /* Description of the input event */,
  "input_type" INTEGER /* Type of the input (e.g., 1 for mouse, 4 for window state) */,
  "input_catalog_time_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp when the input was cataloged */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the input event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user session */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the device used to generate the input */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to generate the input */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Type of operating system used to generate the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_os_type FOREIGN KEY ("os_type") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_input_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_library_id") REFERENCES input_libraries ("input_library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_browser_type FOREIGN KEY ("browser_type") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_blob_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("blob_input_id") REFERENCES blob_inputs ("blob_input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_input_type FOREIGN KEY ("input_type") REFERENCES input_types ("input_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_libraries" (
  "input_library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the input library */,
  "library_version" TEXT /* Version of the input library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input library */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the input library was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the input library was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the input library */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the input library is released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blob_inputs" (
  "blob_input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blob input */,
  "input_library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the input library associated with the blob */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the binary data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the binary data in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blob was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the binary data for integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blob_input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blob_inputs_input_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_library_id") REFERENCES input_libraries ("input_library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_types" (
  "input_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the input type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the input type (e.g., mouse, keyboard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the input event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the input event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES inputs ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input event the metadata is associated with */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_metadata_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES inputs ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input event the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_tags_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES inputs ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input event the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., click, key press) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the event */,
  "event_time_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_events_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES inputs ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization to which the department belongs */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)
